text.message: Lmao we gettting plowed fosho black
Orange would you give me a starting brick? If not that is fine but I will place on the 8-4
If you give me a brick I am going on 6-3-11
Hmmm.  I can't.  I'm so sorry
The 4 isn't going to give me many
u stil got a great set up green
Yeah you're gonna be extra lethal on the sheep port especially having strong brick and wood
gonna be tough keeping pace with ur dv cards
i almopst got an extra card on his turn
You have 4 devs.  I don't think I'm the concern
All knights would be pretty bad luck
I literally have 4 knights in hand
We're prob not gonna trade after a mono lol
Why you being mean to blue?
im playing to slow... i literally said i had a emeregency no care
How could it be an emergency but you're still palying online catan
No one has done anything to orange except me this whole match lol
Black and blue have not stole you a single time
Besides blue about to road settle for win
Couldn't have drawn worse devs if I tried this match
Why would you not expand roads
I would have given you a road
u blocked 1 brick instead of 3 lumber with port
Give me a break black I have thrown the robber on that 10 ore to slow them all game long lol
Oh snap.  Can I borrow a brick lol
Then you need to extend lol
Orange you have a clear pow on black just saying
You can see the devs now
dude stop i cant take road back
I thought it was blue for sure
What is blue crying about now
No. I meant gg to black.  Sorry
